releases.title: Payment classification rules (Patterns A–D)
releases.summary: Fix the long-standing bug where payment methods (LINE Pay, 街口, etc.) were treated as merchants in reward matching. Encodes Unicard 百大 third-party-payment reclassify, Richart 天天刷 TAISHIN_PAY gate at 7-11/全家, 富邦 momo third-party-payment downgrade, and 富邦數位生活卡 channel-rail physical-category exclusion. Engine now honors excludedConditions for PAYMENT/VENUE and removes the merchant→payment bridge.
verification: cardsense-contracts: MOBILE_PAY merchant duplicates removed (199 codes; api copy synced via api PR #5)
render production smoke: PX Mart + LINE Pay + ESUN_UNICARD → recommendationCount=1, contributing promotion is 玉山Unicard 百大指定消費 行動支付（UP選）

releases.title: Repair batch evidence
releases.summary: Completed repair evidence is linked here so the main dashboard can stay focused on current progress and open work.
